aeo_readiness.summary: The business has some foundational elements for AEO but lacks critical optimizations in content, reviews, and local SEO.
quick_wins: Add a descriptive and keyword-rich title tag to improve search engine visibility.
Implement a review generation strategy to build credibility and improve local search rankings.
Optimize website content with relevant HVAC keywords and location-specific terms.

gbp_analysis.found: Business name, address, and phone number (NAP) are present on the website but not consistently formatted.
gbp_analysis.summary: The NAP information is available but lacks consistency and proper formatting, which can hinder local search performance.
critical_issues: Inconsistent NAP formatting across the website.
Missing structured citations on external directories and platforms.

nap_citations.summary: NAP citations are not effectively utilized, with no presence on major directories and inconsistent formatting.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories such as Google My Business, Yelp, and Bing Places.
Ensure consistent NAP formatting across all online platforms and directories.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of keyword optimization and content depth for HVAC services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for specific HVAC services and location-based queries.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Incorporate relevant HVAC keywords and location-specific terms into website content and meta tags.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Develop high-quality, informative content such as blog posts or guides on HVAC topics to establish authority and improve search rankings.

business_name: Master Cooling Mechanical LLC Air Conditioning and Heating
